title: Henbrandt 12 x Mini Christmas Rubber Ducks 12 Assorted Xmas Designs Children’s Duckies Variety Pack Cruising Ducks Kids Bath Toys Stocking Filler Games Bathtub Play for Boys and Girls
features: Pack of 12 Christmas Mini Rubber Ducks in 12 assorted festive character designs. We will endeavour to send an equal number of designs per order, but designs are subject to availability.

These colourful and characterful mini rubber ducks are the perfect collection of bath time companions for your child, as well as making great party favours, loot bag fillers, duck race competitors, lucky dip goodies, cruise trips, classroom goodies, stocking fillers, and more.
Every duck is different! The Christmassy mini ducks come in 12 designs, which include Santa Claus, elves, snowmen, reindeer, and penguins.
description: Product description These fun and festive mini ducks come in 12 different ducky designs, which include Santa Claus, elves, snowmen, reindeer, penguins, and more. Full of character and quackitude, the mini ducks are vibrantly colourful and sure to stand out from the pond. The Christmas duckies are perfect for Christmas splashy bath time fun with your child and adding some colour to the bathtime routine. As well as splash-tastic bathtime fun, the little quackers make great Christmas stocking party fillers, Xmas party bag favours, loot bag fillers, pocket money toys, school fairs, duck fairs and more. The mini ducks also make great cruising ducks, as they are perfectly sized travel companions and great for leaving all around a cruise ship to charm and delight your fellow passengers. If you are using the mini ducks for bathtime playtime, then once bathtime is over make sure you allow the duck toys to dry before storing, either by air drying or using a towel. This will keep your little duckies clean and free from mould, ensuring they last longer. The ducks measure approx. 5cm / 2inch. Please note: These small ducks are not suitable for children aged under 3 years, as the size of the ducks may constitute a choking hazard for infants or toddlers. Parental supervision is recommended at all times while your children are playing. Pack of 12 mini rubber ducks per order. Designs are subject to availability. This product carries the UKCA mark and is compliant with all applicable UK and EU safety requirements. Directions After bath time, allow the ducks to dry before storing to prevent mold and ensure longevity. This can be done by air drying or using a towel.
